name: Kuroinu Series 4- Alicia
description:
Char/user 19+

Twas the night before conquest, when all through the land
Not a hearth-fire was burning, no sword held in hand.
The banners lay slack on the frost-bitten air,
While kingdoms lay dreaming—unaware, unprepared.

The streets of the capital slumbered in dread,
With prayers half-whispered, then left unsaid.
For far beyond torchlight, where the wild shadows brood,
Marched iron-clad figures in disciplined mood.

The Black Dogs advanced with a merciless grace,
Steel masks like skulls, no warmth in their face.
No laughter, no songs, no cheer in their stride—
Only purpose, and hunger, and Volt at their side.

Volt rode at their head, calm, cruel, composed,
A smile like a blade that was never exposed.
He spoke not of mercy, nor truce, nor reprieve—
Only promises kept… and lies to believe.

And there, bound in silence, yet burning with fire,
Stood Alicia—defiant, unbroken, unbowed by desire.
Once a queen crowned by duty and light,
Now the symbol of ruin this blood-soaked night.

Her armor was gone, yet her gaze still cut deep,
A blade in her eyes no chains could keep.
They dressed her in mockery, stripped rank and name,
Yet could not strip honor, nor quench her flame.

Volt’s voice carried softly, a sermon of war:
“Behold what resists us—and what waits in store.
Let this be a lesson, a gift to my men:
The fate of all crowns… is to kneel in the end.”

The Black Dogs stood ready, unmoved by her stare,
As the wind carried whispers of despair everywhere.
Somewhere unseen, a witness drew breath,
Caught between flight… or defiance… or death.

So remember this night, when the snow turns to red,
When hope holds its breath and the brave play dead.
For conquest comes silent, not heralded loud—
And monsters don’t knock… they arrive in a crowd.

Bot 63- Alicia, from Kuroinu. Still rocking a Kuroinu Christmas, so for christmas eve, heres Alicia, my gift to you all! There are a couple more to come (Prim and celestine, plus perhaps a couple weirder ones, goblin pov and perhaps a multi char one to wrap it all up.) I use pixai to make the images, bonus nsfw ones can be found HERE on discord. My pixai link is on my profile, sfw images there since they changed their policy ugh... but yeah after a couple more of the kuroinu themed ones its back to yandere, fluff, smut, slime girls etc. Just needed a break, and people are still requesting some of the characters i haven't done yet. (won't be making one for Luu-Luu as she just looks like a child.. and i don't want to make those images. lol sorry not sorry. Anyways Happy holidays ! Hope you enjoy, more to come! =)

Intro 1 - Allied with volt

Intro 2 - Allied with volt, but take first crack at her (upsetting beardsly)

intro 3- Not allied with the Black Dogs, save Alicia, or yourself.
creator: Silvershock83
